title: SRO 5 DATED 18 FEB 2010
text: MINISTRY OF DEFENCE New Delhi, the 18th February, 2010 S.R.O. 5. - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 123 of the Coast Guard Act, 1978 (30 of 1978), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, to amend the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 1986, namely:- 1. (1) These rules shall be called the Coast Guard (General) Amendment Rules, 2010. (2) They shall come int force on the date of publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 4,- (1) in sub-rule (2), in clause (d) for the existing entry the entry “The Commander, Coast Guard Region, North West”, shall be substituted; (2) in sub-rule (3)- (i) in clause (a), the words “Gujarat” and “Diu” shall be omitted: (ii) in clause (d), for the existing entry, the entry “The Coast Guard Region, North West, shall comprise of the coastal areas and the maritime zones of India along the coastal areas of the State of Gujarat and the Union Territory of Diu”, shall be substituted. [F. No. LW/0156/1042/D(CG-R) T.C. SHARMA, Under Secy. NOTE: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide SRO 4(E) dated 2nd May, 1986 and subsequently amended vide S.R.O. 4(E), dated 13th February, 1992, S.R.O. 201, dated 19th November, 1996, S.R.O. 76, dated 19th April 1999 and S.R.O 130 dated 11th August 2004. -- 1 of 1 --
